Shop Online for Clothing in Kenya at Jumia

Tired of constant visits to brick-and-mortar retail outlets? Looking for affordable yet funky clothing online in Kenya? Jumia has the answer to all your shopping woes. The best thing about Jumia is that it provides all types of clothing for both men and women under one online portal so if you are looking for a one-stop shop for your buying needs in Kenya, Jumia is your best bet for hassle-free shopping online. It showcases a diverse variety of the latest clothing for people of all ages.

Clothing for all Occasions and Seasons

Jumia Kenya offers clothing for all occasions. Formal dresses including dress pants and shirts provide the perfect attire for working men and women. For individuals involved in sports and workout, our sportswear items including gym and yoga sweatshirts and trousers are ideal. For events such as weddings and festivals, women can choose from our traditional clothing range. Clothing is also available for both winters and summers. High quality hoodies, jackets, sweaters, and cardigans provide excellent cover from the chilly winters whereas polo shirts, T-shirts and shorts give a trendy and hip look in summers.

Buy Fashionable Women’s Clothing
Clothing collection at Jumia includes a range of clothing for women including tops, T-shirts, sweaters and cardigans, jackets and coats, jeans and shorts, pants, trousers and leggings, hoodies, skirts, dresses, saree, kurta, traditional wear, playsuits and jumpsuits, track suits, nightwear, and undergarments.

Men’s Fashion Available at the Best Prices
Men’s clothing also covers a variety of clothing products including dress shirts, T-shirts, polo shirts, knitwear and sweatshirts, blazers and jackets, hoodies from Gap, North Face, Nike and Adidas, suits, jeans, trousers and chinos, shorts and underwear etc. Men can buy the products of their choice at the best possible prices.

Shop Kids Clothing & Accessories
Kids’ fashion includes beautifully designed and high quality baby jackets, sweaters, hoodies, baby cotton and wool caps, pants, shirts, trousers and jeans, stylish sunglasses for babies, cute frocks for baby girls, blanket for kids, and pretty hand-knitted woolen socks for babies and kids.

Women’s & Men’s Accessories & Jewelry

Jumia also features premium quality women’s accessories such as handbags from Gucci, Guess, Chanel, CK as well as scarves from the famous brand Zara, hats and hair accessories, and women’s belts and sunglasses.
Men’s accessories include a variety of products such as sunglasses, belts, cuff-links, ties, scarves, bags and wallets, men’s caps, socks and bowties. These products are of the finest quality and are extremely classy. More products here

Jumia; a Convenient Shopping Experience

You can buy fashion items on Jumia Kenya from world class clothing brands such as Adidas, Burberry, Calvin Klein, Cartier, Chanel, Ralph Lauren, Forever 21,Nike,North Face among many others. Compare and contrast prices, quality, and design aspects of the different types of clothing and choose whichever suits them best.

Online buying has been made easier than ever through Jumia’s services that continue long after your purchase. Jumia provides free shipping for shoppers as well as cash on delivery. If the need arises, products can be returned under our flexible return policy.
